Character Module¶

Character module.

Define a base class for all living entities in the game, such as players, NPCs, and enemies.

class model.entities.characters.character.Character(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: MovableEntity, ABC

Represent a base class for all character-type entities.

Extend MovableEntity with health, combat stats, and immortality support.

__EXPECTED_PARAMETERS: dict[str, type] = {'hp': <class 'int'>, 'immortal': <class 'bool'>}¶

Expected initialization parameters.

__ID_PREFIX: str = 'CH'¶

Unique prefix for character entities.

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_damage = 20¶

Default damage.

_max_health = 100¶

Default maximum health.

attack(target)[source]¶

Apply damage to a target entity.

Parameters:

target (Character) – Entity receiving damage.

property damage: int¶

Return character damage value.

property health: int¶

Return current health value.

Returns:

Current HP.

Return type:

int

property is_immortal: bool¶

Return whether character is immortal.

property max_health: int¶

Return maximum health value.

take_damage(attacker)[source]¶

Reduce health based on incoming attacker damage.

Parameters:

attacker (Character) – Entity dealing damage.
